content: I will remove the duplicate sub-tab container, remove the background of the search bar container, shrink and center the search input, and position the "Cadastrar Vaga" button to the right.
thinking:
**Identifying Duplicate Tabs**

I've pinpointed the exact location of the repeated sub-tabs. They are in lines 3642 to 3668. Now I can start to look at how to refactor them.
